items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

items.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
items.summary: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

items.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
items.summary: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 南韓仁川酷澎物流中心大火  消防員灌救13小時仍難撲滅
items.summary: 南韓仁川酷澎（Coupang）物流中心今天發生重大火災，消防單位甚至發布國家消防動員令，動員周邊城市的消防設備與人力，不過因物流中心內多為可燃物，滅火超過13小時仍難以控制。  根據韓聯...…

items.title: 日翁遭「點滴混大便」毒殺   生前曾要求更換涉案護理師
items.summary: 日本千葉縣柏市日前發生駭人醫院謀殺案。一名曾在當地「柏田中醫院」擔任護理師的51歲前職員古川美由紀，涉嫌於1月將排泄物混入75歲住院患者會田榮次的點滴中，導致其死亡被警方逮捕。最...…

items.title: 美擬成立AI模型監管機構  矽谷與華爾街將參與安全性審查
items.summary: 彭博報導，在美國近期數度以國安疑慮，臨時放緩尖端人工智慧（AI）模型的推出，引發矽谷科技領袖不滿後，川普政府考慮成立一個獨立監管機關，在科技產業的參與下審查AI模型的安全性。 ...…
